body: This PR adds values for atmospheric gases, including trace gases, for radiation purposes. The values are taken from the first values in the RRTMGP artifact, as I believe those are the current values we are using by default in the ClimaAtmos implementation of RRTMGP radiation: (https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/blob/main/src/parameterized_tendencies/radiation/radiation.jl lines 167-201). I am adding these here with the hopes to be able to alter individual gases manually for the RCEMIP simulation & other use cases.
title: Add fixed values for atmospheric gases from RRTMGP artifact
